speaker: MATT
raw_text: 28. As you dart around the corner, one of the shifting bookcases comes right in front of you, and you just dart out of the way in time. Scanlan, you barely hold on. I need you to roll a strength check.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: My Locate Object never pinged? My Incantation of Isolation Locate Object?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Interestingly enough, thank you for reminding me of that. As soon as he pulled the book out, the one that he's holding, the one with no text on it, it pinged.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit, I just grabbed a bunch of books, but that's the one!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you sure?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: It's got to be! Keep looking at it while we're flying, see if you can figure it out!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hold it upside down.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Hold onto me, though, because we're going fast.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm going to listen to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Make an arcana check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: 13 plus five, 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18. As you're darting by, you're clutching your side with your hand around her waist, reading it. You almost lose it a couple times.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Plus Jack of All Trades.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So what's the total?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 21. You get the sense that there is something magical about it. I would say, you can't put your finger on it, but what faint arcane essence that you can sense from your usage of spells, and the feeling of releasing spells, the charging and release of arcane energy. You get the sense of that release from the book. It's almost wanting something. It's pulling something very faintly.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What spell? I don't want to hurt it!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Place Mythcarver on it! Place Mythcarver in it!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Okay. I'll place Mythcarver on it. I don't know what to cast on a book!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a dexterity saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll cast Friends on it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That was almost so bad.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You cast Friends on it?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, as you release the cantrip, the book seems to absorb the magic, but no reaction.
